goal: De-duplicate two parallel widget-distribution implementations (a parallel session shipped /widgets/ + wordpress-plugin/meowtarot-widget.php; this session shipped /embed.html + integrations/wordpress/...). Consolidate to a single hub at /widgets/ with one merged plugin.
done: Chose /widgets/ as the single hub (founder: it is live + linked). Rebuilt widgets/index.html into an interactive snippet builder: Spread (Single | Past·Present·Future) + Language (EN | ไทย) segmented toggles that live-update the copy-paste iframe snippet (dropped the no-op ?theme= param the widget ignores), the WP shortcode hint, and the live preview iframe; do-follow keyword-anchored backlink in the snippet (EN/TH). Merged the two WordPress plugins into ONE at wordpress-plugin/meowtarot-tarot-widget/ (richer shortcode [meowtarot_tarot spread|lang|height] + Gutenberg block + readme, PLUS the parallel session's classic sidebar WP_Widget, PLUS a [meowtarot_daily_card] back-compat alias); rebuilt wordpress-plugin/meowtarot-widget.zip (the path /widgets/ downloads) to contain only the consolidated folder. Repointed widget.html (+/th/) ?promo=1 CTA to /widgets/. DELETED embed.html, th/embed.html, integrations/wordpress/*, and the old single-file wordpress-plugin/meowtarot-widget.php. Redirects /embed,/embed.html,/th/embed,/th/embed.html -> /widgets/ 301; sitemap swaps the two /embed entries for one /widgets/.
verified: Headless Chrome on widgets/index.html: toggles update snippet (spread=three & lang=th present, Thai anchor present, theme= ABSENT), preview src, shortcode, and download href (/wordpress-plugin/meowtarot-widget.zip); Thai 3-card preview renders; block.js node --check OK; zip contains only meowtarot-tarot-widget/. PHP not lintable locally (no php) -> runtime-verify in WP Playground.
